titleStmt.title: SII 19.158: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 158. (A.R. No. 574 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTANAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE maṇḍapa IN FRONT OF THE ACHALĒŚVARA SHRINE, TYĀGARĀJASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records an endowment of 30 kaḻañju of gold left with the Nagarattār of Tiruvārūr by Dēvaṉ Aṟubattunālvaṉ for burning a perpetual lamp before god Tiruvaṟaneṟi-Mahādēva-Bhaṭṭāraka with the daily supply of an uḻakku of ghee by the measure Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ. The person on whose behalf the gift was made seems to have been known as Kālāvaṉ Porundampondai-Tirumūlaṭṭānat-Toṇḍar, probably implying that he was a spiritual teacher of the donor. The writing seems to be late and the inscription may be assigned to Rājēndradēva or Vikrama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḥ svasti śrī . koppara
kecaripaṉmaṟkku yā
ṇṭu Āṟāvatu nāḷ 100 10va
tu veḷāṉ kāmaṉ cemaṉāya
kattut tiruvaṟaneṟi mahā
devabhaṭṭārakarkkuk kā
lāvaṉ poruntam pontai
t tirumulaṭṭāṉat toṇ
ṭar nontāviḷakku Oṉṟu
kkuk kuṭutta poṉ muppatiṉka
ḻañcu Ippoṉ koṇṭu Itaṉ
palicaiyāl nāḷvāy Uḻakke
ṇṇai śrīkoyilukkey ko
ṇṭu ceṉṟu tirunilakaṇṭattāl
cantirātittaval Aṭṭuvomā
ṉom tevaṉ Aṟupattunālva
ṉ tanta poṉṉālt tiruvārur
nakarattom Itupaṉmāheśva
ra rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.158 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
